name: Ningbo Haitian Precision Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Haitian Precision Machinery Co., Ltd. provides various machine tools in China. It offers vertical machining centers, gantry machining centers, horizontal machining centers, CNC lathes, turning centers, and other product lines. The company's products are used in automotive, aerospace, rail transportation, mold manufacturing, marine diesel, engineering machinery, machinery manufacturing, and other industries. It also provides after-sales and machine overhaul services. The company is based in Ningbo, China.
